## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Scope

- Type: `feature` / `bugfix` / `refactor` / `infra` / `hotfix`
- Target branch: `dev` (default) or `main` (release/hotfix only)

## Changes

- 

## Screenshots / UI checks (if frontend touched)

- Desktop:
- Mobile:
- Telegram WebApp:

## Database / Migrations

- [ ] No DB changes
- [ ] DB changes included (migration files committed)
- [ ] Backward compatibility considered

## Env / Config changes

- [ ] No new env vars
- [ ] New/changed env vars documented in `.env.example` / `.env.prod.example`

## Testing

- [ ] Local smoke checks completed
- [ ] `CI` is green
- [ ] Added/updated tests for changed behavior

## Release notes (required for `dev -> main`)

- Risk level: `low` / `medium` / `high`
- Rollback plan:
- Post-deploy checks:
